GitHub Actions Supply Chain Attack: Malicious npm Packages

StepSecurity researchers identified a supply chain attack targeting CI/CD pipelines.

Indicators of Compromise

Files and payloads:

  • malicious_action.js
  • exfil.js SHA-256: deadbeef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678
  • stage2.sh SHA-256: cafebabe1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678

Network indicators:

  • hxxps://attacker[.]evil[.]example[.]com/collect
  • hxxp://c2[.]malware[.]example[.]com/cmd
  • 192[.]168[.]100[.]200

Campaign markers:

  • Operation GitSlurp

Remediation

Pin your GitHub Actions to specific commit SHAs.
